steps.title: Multiply both sides by 19u
steps.content:
Start with $n = \frac{p}{19u}$. To isolate $p$, multiply both sides by $19u$:
$$n \cdot 19u = \frac{p}{19u} \cdot 19u$$

steps.title: Simplify to solve for p
steps.content: The $19u$ on the right cancels the denominator, leaving $p = 19un$.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• A. $p = n - 19u$ — subtraction does not undo division; incorrect.
  • B. $p = n + 19u$ — addition does not undo division; incorrect.
  • C. $p = \frac{n}{19u}$ — this would result from dividing, not multiplying; incorrect.
  • D. $p = 19un$ — matches our derivation.
That matches Choice D — $p=19un$.
